title: research on architect agentic ai solution.

todos.active_form: Planning research on architecting agentic AI solutions
todos.content: Create a detailed research plan for architecting agentic AI solutions
Research multi-agent orchestration patterns (e.g., Router, Sequential, Hierarchical, Joint-Collaboration)
Research memory architectures for agents (short-term vs long-term, RAG vs fine-tuning vs context window management)

todos.active_form: Researching tool use and planning strategies
todos.content: Research advanced planning techniques (CoT, Tree of Thoughts, ReAct) and tool-calling mechanisms
Research evaluation frameworks for agentic systems (benchmarks, human-in-the-loop, automated testing)

todos.active_form: Researching real-world deployment and production challenges
todos.content: Research production challenges including latency, cost management, reliability, and security in agentic workflows

todos.active_form: Synthesizing findings into a final report
todos.content: Synthesize all research notes into a comprehensive architectural guide in /workspace/report.md
